title: Seattle puts Microsoft Copilot expansion on hold as new mayor takes stock of AI
summary: Five months after releasing its “responsible AI plan” providing guidelines for the technology's use, the City of Seattle has tapped the brakes on artificial intelligence. Read More
author: Lisa Stiffler

title: Testing LLMs on superconductivity research questions
Scientists discover AI can make humans more creative
summary: Artificial intelligence is often portrayed as a tool that replaces human work, but new research from Swansea University suggests a far more exciting role: creative collaborator. In a large study with more than 800 participants designing virtual cars, researchers found that AI-generated design galleries sparked deeper engagement, longer exploration, and better results.

title: How Attackers Establish Persistence in Hybrid Environments by Lucie Cardiet
summary: Learn how attackers maintain hidden access inside hybrid networks and how SOC teams can detect persistence before it leads to data theft or ransomware.
